notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 40-44 in generated discovery row order.

planar-binding::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Charisma save, eligible creature types, and failed-save Bound state are now represented.
planar-binding::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
planar-binding::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION Bound with Charisma save.

planar-binding::message_or_communication.issue: Commands may include message delivery and completion reporting, with hostile literalism, but runtime lacks typed command/report fields.
planar-binding::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-entity command and report fields.

planar-binding::summon_or_controlled_ent.issue: Runtime now has the Bound state, but the service obligation, extension of another summon spell's duration, hostile literalism, and instruction completion behavior remain prose-only.
planar-binding::summon_or_controlled_ent.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-entity service fields distinct from generic status conditions.

planar-binding::travel_or_planar_movemen.issue: The bound creature travels to report completion on the same plane or returns to the binding place if on another plane; runtime lacks typed travel/report behavior.
planar-binding::travel_or_planar_movemen.recommendedTemplateChange: Add completion travel/report fields with same-plane branching.

planar-binding::conditional_ending.issue: Completion before spell end changes the creature's behavior, and another summon/creation spell's duration can be extended to match Planar Binding; runtime lacks those conditional duration/ending branches.
planar-binding::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-service completion and linked-spell duration-extension fields.

raise-dead::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The revived target takes a -4 penalty to attacks, saves, and ability checks that decreases by 1 after each long rest; runtime has no typed decaying penalty fields.

raise-dead::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Dead no longer than 10 days, willing/free soul, non-Undead target, and intact vital body parts are all eligibility requirements not represented in runtime targeting.
raise-dead::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resurrection eligibility fields for death age, soul willingness/liberty, creature type exclusions, and missing vital parts.

raise-dead::healing_or_restoration.issue: The spell restores life at 1 HP, neutralizes poison, cures nonmagical disease, closes mortal wounds, and does not remove magical disease/curses; runtime keeps this as prose.

raise-dead::status_or_state_change.issue: Dead-to-alive resurrection, Undead exclusion, and the post-resurrection ordeal penalty are not typed in runtime.

rarys-telepathic-bond::choice_or_mode.issue: The up-to-eight target choice is now represented by multi targeting and maxTargets 8.
rarys-telepathic-bond::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new choice field required for this pass.
rarys-telepathic-bond::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.type multi and maxTargets 8.

rarys-telepathic-bond::message_or_commun.issue: Runtime now marks the spell as communication, but the all-to-all telepathic bond, no shared language requirement, any-distance range, and no-other-planes limit remain prose-only.
rarys-telepathic-bond::message_or_commun.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathic bond fields for all-to-all targets, language independence, distance, and plane limit.

rarys-telepathic-bond::travel_or_planar_.issue: The detector matched the no-other-planes communication limit, which is a communication range constraint rather than travel or planar movement.
rarys-telepathic-bond::travel_or_planar_.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

rarys-telepathic-bond::conditional_endin.issue: The bond ends by normal duration and has no special conditional ending beyond the recorded duration.

reincarnate::choice_or_mode.issue: The new body's form is determined by GM choice or a d100 table; runtime has only prose/table text.

reincarnate::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: The target must be a dead humanoid or piece of one, dead no longer than 10 days, with a free and willing soul; runtime targeting only says creatures.
reincarnate::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reincarnation eligibility fields for dead humanoid/piece, death age, and soul willingness/liberty.

reincarnate::status_or_state_change.issue: The spell forms a new adult body, restores life, changes race/species traits, and preserves former memories/capabilities; runtime lacks typed reincarnation state fields.

reincarnate::conditional_ending.issue: The spell fails if the soul is not free or willing; runtime lacks this failure condition.

scrying::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster can target either a same-plane creature or a previously seen location; runtime has only creature targeting.
scrying::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add scrying target-mode fields for creature and location modes.

scrying::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save is modified by knowledge and physical connection, and a knowing target can voluntarily fail; runtime lacks these save modifier tables and voluntary-fail handling.
scrying::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add scrying save modifier and voluntary-fail fields.

scrying::vision_light_sound.issue: Scrying creates invisible remote sight/hearing, with a visible luminous-orb appearance to creatures that can see invisible objects; runtime keeps this in prose.
scrying::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor visibility and perception fields.

scrying::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: The invisible sensor appears within 10 feet of a failed-save target, follows it, or appears at a chosen seen location and remains stationary; runtime lacks sensor placement/movement fields.
scrying::sensor_or_remote_perception.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor placement and follow/stationary mode fields.

scrying::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The same-plane phrase limits target eligibility and does not move a creature or object between planes.
scrying::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

scrying::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Knowledge of the target and physical connection modify the save, and a known casting can be voluntarily failed; runtime lacks these knowledge/social consent mechanics.

scrying::status_or_state_change.issue: The invisible sensor and its luminous-orb appearance to creatures that see invisible objects are state changes not represented as data.

rarys-telepathic-bond.title: Target Filters And Eligibility
rarys-telepathic-bond.canonicalEvidence: Creatures with Intelligence scores of 2 or less aren't affected by this spell.
rarys-telepathic-bond.jsonState: Runtime has no Intelligence threshold target filter.
rarys-telepathic-bond.issue: The spell excludes creatures with Intelligence 2 or less, but runtime targeting lacks ability-score eligibility filters.
rarys-telepathic-bond.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by ability-threshold propagation: structured markdown now records the target ability, operator, and threshold value.
rarys-telepathic-bond.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by ability-threshold propagation: targeting.filter.abilityThreshold now carries the matching runtime facts.
rarys-telepathic-bond.reviewerNote: Closed because this target-filter finding is fully represented by the new abilityThreshold fields.
